entry.title: Honch Ingest is down
entry.summary: [Resolved] In [`f813ae5`](https://github.com/honch-io/upptime/commit/f813ae543d14d4b84b4e801fb9613163077c9bcd ), Honch Ingest (https://is.honch.io) was **down**: - HTTP code: 502 - Response time: 40 ms
